The loading time is really frustrating, especially when I'm trying to pull up something in a meeting

The search bar basically never returns what I'm actually looking for
I accidentally deleted a project and there was no way to undo it

I have no idea what half the icons in the toolbar mean

The onboarding tutorial was so long I just skipped it, and then I was completely lost
I can never remember where the billing page is buried
When I share a link with my team, they always have to log in again even if they already have accounts
The dashboard widgets rearrange themselves every time I log in, which is disorienting
There's no keyboard shortcut for the one action I do fifty times a day
The error messages are completely useless, they just say something went wrong with no detail
I tried to set up the integration with Slack three times and it failed silently each time
The color contrast is so low I can barely read the secondary text
It took me two weeks to realize there was a bulk edit feature hidden in a dropdown
The file upload limit is way too small for the kind of documents we work with
I keep getting logged out randomly in the middle of my work
The date picker doesn't let me type a date manually, I have to click through months one by one
Switching between projects is painfully slow, there's no quick switcher
The permissions system is so confusing that we just give everyone admin access
I accidentally sent an incomplete report to a client because the save and send buttons are right next to each other
The help docs are always out of date and show screenshots from an older version
I can't customize the columns in the table view, so I'm always scrolling sideways to find what I need
The auto-save never seems to work when I need it most, I've lost entire paragraphs of notes
There's a three-second delay every time I switch tabs that breaks my concentration
The notification badge shows a number but when I click it, there's nothing new to see
We had to create a separate shared document just to explain our internal conventions because the tool doesn't support naming rules
The chart visualization is misleading because the Y-axis doesn't start at zero and you can't change it
Every time I try to copy-paste from the tool into an email, the formatting gets completely mangled
I can't drag tasks between different project boards, so I end up duplicating them manually
The tool shows me information I don't have permission to act on, which is confusing
There's no way to see a chronological history of changes to a single task
The tooltips appear too slowly and disappear too quickly to actually read them
I tried to merge two duplicate tasks and lost all the comments from one of them
The calendar view doesn't show tasks that span multiple days correctly, they just appear on the start date
Our team can't agree on the taxonomy because the tool doesn't enforce consistent labeling
The import feature claimed it succeeded but half the data was silently dropped
I can't filter by two criteria at the same time without using some advanced syntax I don't understand
The link previews don't work for internal pages, so shared links are just cryptic URLs
Every time there's an update, my custom workflow automations break and I have to rebuild them
The tool doesn't warn me before I navigate away from an unsaved form
I needed to train five new team members and there's no way to share my custom views with them
The print view is unusable, it cuts off text and doesn't paginate properly
I can't tell which items in my inbox need my action versus which are just informational
The session timeout is too short, I step away for ten minutes and have to log in again
There's a bug where if you scroll too fast the page goes blank and you have to reload
The recurring task feature creates duplicates instead of resetting the original task
I can't attach more than one file at a time, so uploading ten documents takes forever
The placeholder text in the search box vanishes too quickly before I can read what formats are supported
When I collapse a section, it re-expands every time I come back to the page
The analytics dashboard doesn't update in real-time, I have to manually refresh to see today's numbers
The dropdown menus close if my cursor drifts even slightly outside the boundary
I created a template but there's no way to share it with the rest of my organization
The tool marks tasks as overdue at midnight but our team works across multiple time zones
There's no confirmation dialog before archiving a project, I've done it by accident twice
The comment threading doesn't work properly, replies sometimes appear out of order
I can't export just the current filtered view, it always exports everything
The contrast between read and unread items is so subtle I can't tell them apart
The dependency arrows in the Gantt chart overlap so much they're completely unreadable
It takes six clicks to do something that should be a right-click context menu action
The tool sends email notifications for my own actions, which clutters my inbox
I can't snooze a task notification for a specific time, it's either dismiss or nothing
The dark mode has contrast issues that make some status badges completely invisible
There's a loading spinner that appears for every tiny interaction and it makes the tool feel sluggish
The autocomplete in the search field suggests results from archived projects that aren't relevant anymore
I can't set different notification preferences for different projects
The table sort only works on one column at a time and doesn't remember my preference
When I paste a URL it doesn't auto-detect and create a clickable link
The maximum tag length is too short to be descriptive, so all our tags are cryptic abbreviations
